metadata.description: This is coming from the parameter File under Parameters
This is coming from the parameter File under Parameters

logAnalyticsFunctions.name: GetMonitoredSQLComputers
logAnalyticsFunctions.query:
Heartbeat
 | where Computer contains 'SQL'
 | distinct Computer

logAnalyticsFunctions.name: GetExcludedSqlJobs
logAnalyticsFunctions.query:
let ExcludeSQLJobName = datatable(JobName: string)
    [
    "PushSQLLogsIntoOMS",
    "EnableLoggingOnSQLJobFailure",
    "GetTelemetryDetails",
    "PushOrchestrationDataIntoOMS",
    "CaptureDRSTelemetry",
    "KillInvalidSPIDs",
    "Enable Encryption for All Databases",
    "KillConcurrentDRSUserSPIDs",
    "PushMCStagingDataIntoOMS",
    "CheckpointWorkArea",
    "GrantWorkDB",
    "DropOldWorkAreaTables",
    "GrantWorkArea"
    ];
ExcludeSQLJobName

emailReceivers.comment: This is a place holder for ICM implementation
emailReceivers.name: Test

alerts.name: SQL-Job-Failures
alerts.description: Important SQL Job has failed. See query results for job name and server.

criteriaDetails.query:
let splitter = (inputString:string) { split(replace(@'</Param>','',inputString),"<Param>") };
Event | where EventLog == 'Application'
    and Source == 'SQLSERVERAGENT'
    and Computer in (GetMonitoredSQLComputers)
        and RenderedDescription contains "Scheduled Job"
| extend info = splitter(ParameterXml)
| project  OmsTime=TimeGenerated, JobFailureUTCMinus8h=datetime_add('hour', 8, todatetime(info[4])), Computer, JobName=info[1],Status=info[3],Message=info[5]
| where JobName !in (GetExcludedSqlJobs)

alerts.name: ActiveDirectory-SQLLogin-Audit
alerts.description: This alert will monitor the number of Login Failure attempts for INVRSQLPRD1.redmond.corp.microsoft.com and INVRSQLPRD2.redmond.corp.microsoft.com. The query checks for Audit Alerts, and connections failurs over a period of 15 minutes. If more than 10 connection failures exist, please research and determine what is causing connection failures to the machines as this could be a pontential outage.

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where Computer has_any ("INVRSQLPRD1.redmond.corp.microsoft.com", "INVRSQLPRD2.redmond.corp.microsoft.com")
| where
 EventLevelName contains "Audit Error" 
 and RenderedDescription contains "Login failed" 
 and ParameterXml matches regex "[CLIENT:.*]"

alerts.name: High-CPU
alerts.description: Detected VM/s that running high CPU consumption

criteriaDetails.query: Perf | where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" | summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), Computer | sort by TimeGenerated desc | where AggregatedValue > 90

Event
| where ParameterXml has "the database-principal"
| where EventLevelName == "Error"

alerts.name: High-Memory-Usage
alerts.description: Detected VM/s with High Memory Usage

criteriaDetails.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Memory" 
| where CounterName == "Available MBytes" 
| summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m), Computer 
| sort by TimeGenerated desc 
| where AggregatedValue < 512

alerts.name: New-Server-Administrator-Has-Been-Added
alerts.description: New Operating System Administrator has been added

criteriaDetails.query:
NTAdminAccounts_CL
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "itsvc0")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "ITSVC0")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "Domain Admins")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "JIT_CFE-MSInvoice-PROD-REDMOND_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "JIT_CFE-MSInvoice-PROD-PARTNERS_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "JIT_CFE-MSInvoice-PROD-NORTHAMERICA_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "ITG-GDCTools")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "ITG-ADMIN")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "InfoSec Secure Environment")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "ExNet Security")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "uart2svc")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "Jit_ITG-GCO_ElevatedAccess") 
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "Jit_SDO-DCOPS-ADMIN_ElevatedAccess")  
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "JIT_CFE-MSInvoice-PPE-REDMOND_ElevatedAccess")  
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "Jit_DCTools-Admin_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "invgmsasvcp")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "invgmsasvcp$")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "Jit_ISRM-SecOps-InfoSecSecureEnv_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "SA_InfoSec-Secure-Environment_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "JIT_ExNet-Security-partners_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "SA_ExNet-Security-partners_ElevatedAccess")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "invoiceprdstg$")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "capscansvc")
| where ( OSAdministrator_s != "capscansvc$")

alerts.name: Cache-Buffer-Size
alerts.description: App Fabric Cache Buffer is not big enough

criteriaDetails.query: Event | where EventLevelName == "error"| where Source == "MSInvoice"| where ParameterXml has "The connection was terminated, possibly due to server or network problems or serialized Object size is greater than MaxBufferSize on server"
Event | where Source == "Z_Rfc_Calculate_Tax_Amnt" | where ParameterXml has "Cannot find tax area"

alerts.name: Classic-Assembly-Missing
alerts.description: Detected conflict or missing DLLs in the system. GAC could help here

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where ParameterXml contains "Could not load file or assembly"

alerts.name: Cluster-Quorum-Failure
alerts.description: Detected Issues With The Cluster Quorum

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where ( EventID == 1564 )

alerts.name: Server-Ping-Test-Failure
alerts.description: Heartbeat of VM/s has not been reported

criteriaDetails.query:
Heartbeat
| where Computer in (['GetAllComputers'])

alerts.name: Windows-Service-Stopped
alerts.description: One of the Windows services have stopped, please go to the logs, identify the service name, and start the service

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where (EventID == 7036 or EventID == 7034)
| where (RenderedDescription has "The MSInvoiceEIService" or RenderedDescription has "The MSApprovalsNotificationService" or RenderedDescription has "The MSInvoiceApprovalService" or RenderedDescription has "The MSInvoiceEDIService service" or RenderedDescription has "The MSInvoiceEmailService service" or RenderedDescription has "The MSInvoiceOCRService service" or RenderedDescription has "The InvoiceSAPSyncDb service")
| where RenderedDescription contains "stop"

alerts.name: App-Service-Fabric-Service-Teminated
alerts.description: App Service Fabric Windows Service stopped

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where Source == 'Service Control Manager' and EventLevelName == 'Error'
and RenderedDescription contains "AppFabric Caching Service service terminated unexpectedly"

alerts.name: Windows-Service-Failed-To-Start
alerts.description: App Service Fabric Windows Service stopped

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where EventLevel == 1
| where RenderedDescription contains "Service cannot be started"

alerts.name: Low-Space-In-Drive
alerts.description: Detected VM/s drive/s running out of space

criteriaDetails.query:
Perf
| where InstanceName == "C:" or InstanceName == "D:" or InstanceName == "E:" or InstanceName == "G:" or InstanceName == "H:" or InstanceName == "I:" or InstanceName == "J:" or InstanceName == "K:" or InstanceName == "L:" or InstanceName == "O:"
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space" 
| summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m), Computer, InstanceName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| where AggregatedValue <5

alerts.name: Classic-SharePoint-Number-Of-Files-Limitation-Reached
alerts.description: Detected issues while trying to upload to SharePoint Document collection

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where ParameterXml contains "The attempted operation is prohibited because it exceeds the list view threshold enforced by the administrator"
| where ParameterXml contains "MS.IT.MSInvoice.DocRepository.DocRepositoryException"
| where EventLevelName == "Error"

alerts.name: SAP-RFC-Failures
alerts.description: SAP Failure Rate has increased to an abnormal level, please see this OneNote page: https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7Bbe0bd05d-2981-4cd2-9d48-4296951bf1b2%7D&action=edit&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24a2422b-2df1-4ea3-9eaa-36be87e9057f%2FAI%20Alert%20SAPRFCFailures%7Ce9005b6e-d06c-4cdc-ac54-3949c4076e9a%2F%29&wdorigin=703&wdpreservelink=1

criteriaDetails.query:
let SuccessResults= Event 
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where toupper(Source) has toupper("Z_") 
| where EventLevelName == "Information" 
| where toupper(Source)!='Z_RFC_INVOICEAPPRVL'
| where ParameterXml !has "Preparing"
| summarize SuccessAggregatedValue = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), EventLevelName, RFCName=toupper(Source); SuccessResults 
| join kind= rightouter  ( Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m) 
| where toupper(Source) has toupper("Z_") 
| where EventLevelName == "Error" 
| where toupper(Source)!='Z_RFC_INVOICEAPPRVL'
| where ParameterXml !has "Preparing"
| summarize ErrorAggregatedValue = count() by ErrorTime=bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), EventLevelName, RFCName2=toupper(Source) ) on $left.RFCName == $right.RFCName2 and $left.TimeGenerated ==$right.ErrorTime
| summarize by Time=iff(isnull(TimeGenerated),ErrorTime,TimeGenerated),  RFC_Name=iff(isnull(SuccessAggregatedValue),RFCName2,RFCName) , Success = iff(isnull(SuccessAggregatedValue), 0,SuccessAggregatedValue),  Error=ErrorAggregatedValue
| extend PercentFailure = (Error*100)/(Success + Error) 
| where (Success + Error) > 30
| where PercentFailure > 30
| project Time, RFC_Name, Success, Error,PercentFailure

alerts.name: Empty-App-Fabric-Cache
alerts.description: Detected empty cache

criteriaDetails.query: Event| where ParameterXml has "ApplicationError.aspx"| where ParameterXml has "MS.IT.MSInvoice.EntLib.VelocityCache.ApplicationCacheManager.GetDataFromCache(String key)"

alerts.name: VM-Backup-Failure
alerts.description: VM Backup has failed

criteriaDetails.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(3d)
| where ( ResourceType == "VAULTS" )
| where ( JobOperation_s == "Backup" )
| where JobFailureCode_s != "Success"
| where ProtectedContainerUniqueId_s has 'iaasvmcontainerv2'
 | summarize FailureCount=count() by ProtectedContainerUniqueId_s 
| where FailureCount >1

alerts.name: SAP-Connectivity-Failures
alerts.description: SAP Connectivity Failures

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where ParameterXml has "Connect To SAP gateway failed Connect"

alerts.name: DB-Sync-Windows-Service-Failures
alerts.description: SAP DB Sync Windows Service is failing to complete sync jobs

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where Source == "InvoiceSAPSyncDb"
| where EventLevelName == "Error"
ClusterVirtualDisk_CL | where (State_s != "0" and State_s!="Healthy" )

alerts.name: DMS Down Notification Alert
alerts.description: If DMS is down, trigger alert & raise sev3 incident.

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| extend
    Origin = tostring(customDimensions["Origin"]),
    Component = tostring(customDimensions["Component"])
| where Origin contains "DMSUploadService"
| where timestamp > ago(5m)

alerts.name: MSInvoiceEndPointUnavailable
alerts.description: Trigger AppInsights alert to fininvdri@microsoft.com if https://einvoice.microsoft.com service is down.

criteriaDetails.query:
availabilityResults
| where success != 1
| where customDimensions.Category <> "Function.PurchaseOrderServiceHeartbeat"
| where customDimensions.Category <> "Function.CompanyConfigurationHeartbeat"
| summarize Count = count() by location
| where (location has "Asia" and Count > 0)
  or (location has "US" and Count > 0)
  or (location !contains "Asia" and location !contains "US" and Count >= 3)

alerts.name: Server 500 Error Notification Alert
alerts.description: Request thowing error with 500 result code

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where resultCode == "500"
| where timestamp > ago(15min)

alerts.name: Successful LoggedIn Users with No Roles in EUA
alerts.description: This alerts when user successfully logins to Vnext UI but has roles returned from EUA

criteriaDetails.query:
traces
| where message == 'Response from EUA'
| extend EmailAddress = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ResponseBody)).AuthClaims)).UserEmail)
| extend SupplierId = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ResponseBody)).AuthClaims)).Supplier))[0].SupplierId)
| extend  Roles = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ResponseBody)).AuthClaims)).Supplier)))
| join kind=inner (
customEvents
| where customDimensions['Origin'] in ('UI')
| where operation_Name has_any ('supplier/invoices')
| where customDimensions.EnvironmentInstance == "prod-vnext"
| where name == 'msal:loginSuccess'
| extend EmailAddress= tostring(user_Id)
) on EmailAddress
| project EmailAddress, SupplierId, Roles, timestamp
| where Roles == "[]"

alerts.name: Failed Park Doc Report Alert
alerts.description: Alert for failed Park Doc Report

criteriaDetails.query:
union isfuzzy=true
    traces
| where timestamp >= ago(1d)
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("InvoiceSAPSyncDbWindowsService")
| where message contains "Finished retrieving 0 pending"
| summarize Count = count() by message
| order by message desc
| where Count >= 8

alerts.name: Purchase Classification Returns no Response
alerts.description: Trigger an alert when purchase classification returns no response.

criteriaDetails.query:
union isfuzzy=true dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("InvoiceService")
| where target == "https://procurementdataservices.azurewebsites.net/"
| order by timestamp desc
| extend classificationId = customDimensions.classificationId
| extend ResultCount = tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ReturnResult)).Count) | where ResultCount == "0"

alerts.name: EUA Service call failed
alerts.description: This alerts when API service call to to EUA fails.

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "AuthorizationManagementService"
| where target contains "https://euaaccesssupplierservice"
| summarize
Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
by client_StateOrProvince
| where Failed > 5
| project
Reliability = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed),
client_StateOrProvince

alerts.name: SLM compliance block response true
alerts.description: This alerts when SLM Compliance block response is true

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.FeatureName == "Compliance Block"
| where name == "Response from SLM"
| extend SupplierId_ = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ResponseBody)).Data)).SupplierId)
| extend ComplianceBlock = tostring(customDimensions.ComplianceBlock)
| where customDimensions.ComplianceBlock == "True"

alerts.name: Failed Metadata-Get Tax Alert
alerts.description: This alert when there are tax exceptions in modern supplier UI

criteriaDetails.query:
union isfuzzy=true exceptions
| extend message_ = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.Response))[0].errors)).overall))[0].message)
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("UI") and problemId !contains ("ErrorEvent: Script error.")
| where type contains "Metadata - Get Tax"
| where message_ contains "Object reference not set to an instance of an object"
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| distinct tostring(customDimensions.XCV)

alerts.name: SharePoint-Authorization-Error
alerts.description:
This a temp sev 3 alert. When this alert is trigger, We need to do IIS reset in the server that is currently taking traffic, most likely IIS1. bring passive server online, bring active server offline. 
Open CMD in server and do iis reset once that is complete, bring iis1 back as the only active. https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2FTake%20an%20IIS%20node%20offline%20and%20online%7CD33C233B-4DB0-48DB-89EE-7D864F179549%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#Take%20an%20IIS%20node%20offline%20and%20online&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={D33C233B-4DB0-48DB-89EE-7D864F179549}&object-id={38BA19D6-D20E-04B2-1D11-637ADAC14792}&12

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where ParameterXml contains "An exception of type 'MS.IT.MSInvoice.DocRepository.DocRepositoryException' occurred and was caught."
| where ParameterXml contains "The remote server returned an error: (401) Unauthorized."

alerts.name: SAP-MRM_QUANTITY_CHECK-ERROR
alerts.description: This alert is triggered when a configuration in SAP is violated by creating a PO that has too many invoices in the same line. In order to fix this, SAP and AP team need to work together break the remaining amount on the line to a new line and resubmit the invoices. The failing invoices would have to be deleted. AP will take care of it

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
| where ParameterXml contains "MRM_QUANTITY_CHECK"

alerts.name: A-KeyVault-Item-Is-Near-Expiration
alerts.description: This Alert triggers when a Keyvault item is about to expire. Review the Log, identify the secret, plan rotation, rotate the Item and disable the old item

criteriaDetails.query:
AzureDiagnostics 
| where Resource contains "APPKVCLASSIC" or Resource contains "GLOBAL"
| where OperationName contains "Expiry"

alerts.name: Classic Certificate Expiring in 30 Days
alerts.description: These certificates are installed in IaaS VMs, please review the logs to identify where the certificates need to be renewed and renew the those certificates

criteriaDetails.query:
CurrentCerts_CL 
| where Subject_s !contains 'ASR_CLO'
| where Subject_s !contains "Azure Backup"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=AzureDSCExtension"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=CLIUSR"
| where Subject_s !contains "DC=Windows Azure CRP Certificate Generator"
| where Subject_s !contains "localhost"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=583c74ec-ca41-4bfc-abe4-c64779843ba3"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=cd3016cb-2bd7-4c84-a10f-6762dbe6abea"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=06bf9e9f-87bc-4adc-94f3-1181e90718c7"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=421f5a6b-13c3-4719-be8e-134131626390"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=7187a882-533e-4706-8166-cb65ecda1515"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=90f8f707-89bd-4d1e-9ac2-d60c60055d78"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=ef4127ed-b335-4db4-8421-e46f7bf0bcdd"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=e39684e4-a422-4693-a359-08b767ebeafa"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=d58dad7b-df60-4fab-9dd7-4acedde6db8a"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=c0d0fca3-a73a-4ad4-ae0e-b5677ce9bf4a"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=c0d0fca3-a73a-4ad4-ae0e-b5677ce9bf4a"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=aad.einvoice.microsoft.com"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=einvoice.aad.invoice.microsoft.com"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=aad.invoice.microsoft.com"
| where Subject_s !contains "AzureServiceFabric"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=Microsoft IT TLS CA 1, OU=Microsoft IT, O=Microsoft Corporation, L=Redmond, S=Washington, C=US"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=Baltimore CyberTrust Root, OU=CyberTrust, O=Baltimore, C=IE"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=Microsoft RSA TLS CA 01, O=Microsoft Corporation, C=US"
| where Subject_s !contains "CN=https://eus2-agentservice-prod-1.azure-automation.net/accounts"
| where TimeGenerated >ago(2h)
| summarize by ServerName_s, Subject_s,FriendlyName_s,Expiration_t
| where Expiration_t > ago(1h)
| where Expiration_t < ago(-31d)

alerts.name: AI-Assembly-Missing
alerts.description: Detected conflict or missing DLLs in the system. GAC could help here

criteriaDetails.query: exceptions | where outerMessage contains "Could not load file or assembly"

alerts.name: Document-Failed-Sync-To-Classic
alerts.description: find the OCR node and restart it You need to sync these documents manually for reporting.

criteriaDetails.query:
let failed_sync = dependencies
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("InvoiceSyncService")
| where success in ("False") and name contains "documentmetadata"
| extend document_id = extract("([0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12})", 1, name)
| order by timestamp desc
| project timestamp, document_id, name, cloud_RoleInstance;

let sync_messages = traces
| where message contains "DocumentRequestMessage received for document id:"
| extend invoice_number = extract("([0-9]{10})", 1, message)
| extend document_id = extract("([0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12})", 1, message)
| order by timestamp desc
| project timestamp, invoice_number, document_id, message;

failed_sync
| join kind=inner (sync_messages) on $left.document_id == $right.document_id

alerts.name: Z_Rfc_Invoiceapprvl-SAP-Runtime-Error-Count-Greater-Than-Threshold
alerts.description: This alert rule will fire when there are more than 0 records indicating there was a runtime error (e.g. DB Lock) when calling Z_Rfc_Invoiceapprvl. Please check the query for the document number and the error message for more details.

criteriaDetails.query:
Event
 | where Source == "Z_Rfc_Invoiceapprvl" and ParameterXml has '"Out_Rc":"18"'
 | extend parsedXml = parse_xml(ParameterXml)
 | extend xmlInnerText = tostring(parsedXml["Param"]["#text"])
 | extend requestTextSplit = parse_json(split(xmlInnerText, "Request: "))[1]
 | extend responseTextSplit = parse_json(split(requestTextSplit, "Response: "))
 | extend requestJson = responseTextSplit[0]
 | extend responseJson = responseTextSplit[1]
 | extend returnCode = parse_json(tostring(responseJson)).Out_Rc
 | extend responseMessage = parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(responseJson)).Tbl_Tc_Message)).[0].MSGTX
 | extend documentNumber = parse_json(tostring(requestJson)).In_Doc_Num
 | project TimeGenerated, documentNumber, returnCode, responseMessage
